project.name: AEM Loki Integrator - Core Bundle
project.description: OSGi bundle that forwards AEM/Sling/Felix log events to a Grafana Loki push endpoint via two independent sources: (1) a drop-in logging facade (com.adobexp.log.Logger / com.adobexp.log.LoggerFactory) that first-party code imports instead of SLF4J; every call is delegated to SLF4J (so Logback keeps writing aemerror.log) and tee'd to Loki with zero file I/O; (2) an opt-in file tailer for capturing third-party bundle logs (com.adobe.*, com.day.*, org.apache.sling.*, ...) that do not use the facade. The bundle has zero compile-time or runtime dependency on Logback, SLF4J internals, or any third-party logging library, which keeps AEMaaCS Code Quality rule S1874 green. All runtime settings come from a single OSGi configuration.
